action.description: A treasury agent proposes one capped devnet transfer.
action.consequentialReason: The relying party must reject an altered, stale, replayed, or unapproved transfer.

relyingParty.name: Replace with protocol, wallet, treasury, or operator name
relyingParty.acceptanceBoundary: Before broadcast and again before the relying system accepts the executed action.
relyingParty.publicAcceptanceRule: We reject this automated action unless requireAuthorizedAction passes before broadcast and requireAcceptedAction passes after execution for the exact record.
